stonetop.summary: A saber-toothed cat the size of two cougars; once Stone Lord pets.

system.concept: A saber-toothed cat the size of two cougars; once Stone Lord pets.
system.description: Like a cougar but twice as big, with eight-inch fangs hanging out of their mouths. @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.NS2bhYMi23m0eWao]{Hillfolk} tales claim they once were much more common — pets of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.rJiU3RhbILojTC2u]{Stone Lords}, even. Now they are, thankfully, rare.

lore.prompt: **Something interesting:** Some @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.NS2bhYMi23m0eWao]{Hillfolk} bands 'adopt' a kleztigr, making offerings of meat or young goats, sheep, or even horses. The kleztigr follows the band about, protecting them from outsiders.
**Something useful:** Such a kleztigr won't harm anyone wearing some item or clothing distinctive to 'their' band (but it might expect a present).
